text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan injures herself during training, so I
bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I'm so sorry, Big Bro... I went and got
myself hurt...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I'm so sorry, Big Sis... I went and got myself
hurt...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't hate me, please... Sob...
choice_data_list: I'll only hate you if you don't get better soon.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ♪ Thanks. You're so nice. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ♪ Thanks. You're so nice. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'm just gonna lie down and nurse
myself back to a hundred percent!
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll get better soon.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I actually got injured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Curren Chan is frustrated over her injury.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're so mean!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're so mean!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Whatever. Now my mood is all rotten!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan's recovery ends up taking longer
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: No! I'm gonna do my best to get better. So... so...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't say something so sad... I know I messed up
today...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I just want you to tell me to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I just want you to tell me to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If you're here supporting me, I'm sure I can get
better. So, please...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If you're here supporting me, I'm sure I can get
better. So, please...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan looks at me with teary eyes. Almost
instinctively, my mouth starts to move on its own.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Okay!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be cuter and healthier than ever before you
know it, so wait for me, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be cuter and healthier than ever before you
know it, so wait for me, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan recovers remarkably quickly, and we
return to training in no time.
